environment_prompt: A modern minimalist bedroom with a low-profile dark wood bed frame, white bedding and soft gray blankets, built-in white wardrobe with a vertical glass display section showing decorative objects, light marble flooring, a dark bedside table with a black modern desk lamp, soft ambient ceiling lighting, tidy and uncluttered space, contemporary interior design, a closed dark wooden door recessed into the wall on the right side. Off-screen behind the door: a hallway or corridor where a woman carrying a teacup can approach and enter the room.
perspective_prompt: First-person point of view at standing eye height, looking straight on at the bed and storage wall from across the room.

interactions.action: The bedroom door opens and a woman carrying a teacup walks in, speaking toward the viewer.
The woman throws the teacup onto the floor, then throws herself onto the bed.
